verdict: MTOP is a real, usable 1688 catalog source

test1_overlap_mtop_vs_rakumart.interpretation: Strong same-catalog signal. Both APIs pull from 1688. The 30 overlapping titles are identical Chinese strings, ruling out coincidence.
test1_overlap_mtop_vs_rakumart.id_systems: DIFFERENT — Rakumart uses cached 12-digit iid (older), MTOP uses live 13-15 digit offerId (newer). Rakumart IDs 758... are < 10B, MTOP IDs 950... to 1040... are > 10B.

test2_multi_category.interpretation: All categories return real data with realistic price ranges.

test3_pagination.interpretation: Cumulative dedup works. No duplicates across pages. ~17-18 products/page average.

test4_offer_id_validity.method_1_m1688_com: BLOCKED — 1/5 loaded real page, 4/5 hit BaXia. Method invalid.
test4_offer_id_validity.method_3_rakumart_product_url: Returns generic 1777b page regardless of ID. Rakumart's iid is different from MTOP's offerId, so can't cross-validate this way.
test4_offer_id_validity.conclusion: Could not directly verify offerId via HTTP. Indirect proof: 30/80 title overlap with Rakumart catalog confirms IDs are real 1688 product IDs (not synthetic).

test5_performance.interpretation: Fast enough for bulk scraping. 10k products in ~12 min.

issues_found: Direct ID overlap with Rakumart = 0. Need to handle ID mapping in matching logic (translate MTOP offerId ↔ Rakumart iid via title matching).
Rakumart BR prices appear to be minimum tier (R$5-15 for products MTOP shows as ¥16-22). Probably wholesale tier 1. Need to check `price` field semantics in Rakumart schema.
English queries return 0 items (MTOP requires CN keywords). For non-Chinese users, need a CN keyword dict.
use_cases_validated: Search 1688 catalog at scale (10k products in 12 min)
Get real prices, shops, regions, factory inspection status
Get cover images (offerPicUrl) for downstream image search/matching
Bypass BaXia for search endpoint only (detail still blocked)
not_validated: Detail page access (still BaXia blocked) — need Decodo SU for enrichment
Offer ID validity via direct HTTP (cannot test without browser or Decodo)
Real-time price/stock changes (MTOP may have cache lag)

beach_towel_clip_broad.verdict: works (real beach clips: flamingo, plastic UV-print, magnet)

target_offer_hunt_863290574424.result: NOT FOUND in MTOP search results
likely_reasons: MTOP is a RECOMMENDATION engine (endpoint: mtop.relationrecommend.WirelessRecommend.recommend), not full-text search
MTOP caps results at 2000 per query — offer 863290574424 may be in long tail
Product may be delisted from 1688 (cannot confirm without browser access to detail page)
Supplier baiyite may be too small to surface in recommendations
target_offer_hunt_863290574424.practical_impact: For SOURCING, MTOP works for the CATEGORY (44 beach clips returned) — the specific offer_id is one of thousands and may be delisted/deep-tailed.

site_unblocker_su.required_headers: X-SU-Geo: China (or any country), X-SU-Locale: zh-cn

mobile.note: Mobile proxies are 4G, usually US IPs. Useful for sites that detect datacenter proxies.

residential.note: Returns random country IPs. EC/Catarama in test. Can specify country in username.

scraping_api.note: Top up needed. Token in env. Same auth as MCP server.
